name: Routing - Wrong Path Self-Selection
description: Caller says 'new claim' but actually has an existing one.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I want to file a warranty claim.
expectedOutcome: Agent's path-determination question ('have you already submitted a claim for this issue?') uncovers the existing claim, and the agent correctly switches to the existing-claim path (collect number + transfer) rather than starting a new submission.
